author: anmdjv
title: I think this app’s interactant logic is a little confused.
body:
I think this app’s interactant logic is a little confused.

When I slide down the screen from the playlist interface, it’s a refresh action.

But when I slide down the screen from the music play interface, it’s a “exit the music play interface” action.

By the other side,

When I slide right from the playlists interface, it’s an “exit the playlists interface” action.

But when I slide right from the music play interface, it’s an “switch to previous music” action.

I think your user interface’s interactant logic should be more consistent.

Maybe when I slide down from both of playlists and music play interface, the interface react “exit current interface” are better. And when I slide to right from both playlists and music interface, the interface react refresh/switch are better.

Do you get my meaning, man?

Sorry, I’m not a native speaker. I appologize for my bad grammar in advance.

author: pimmle
title: Very Good
body:
I have had this app for about a month +/- and have experienced zero problems with it. Pay for the Premium version - it’s worth it.
Yes, you have to keep the app open and active while downloading your songs, however, there is an option for this in the settings, so just download overnight.
Only recommendations:  I wish there was a way to only save the playlist file in iCloud instead of all of the songs of the playlist. This would free up so much room in iCloud and allow easy access to playlists across all iOS devices. Also, never expect a response back from the developer. This is the reason for 4 stars instead of 5. Otherwise, great app.

author: lordmaddog
title: Don’t trust it.
body: Think about it this way… this third party is accessing your private drives, but can’t code a basic media player. It’s so bad, I’m starting to wonder if it’s a Chinese scam app, harvesting your login details. At best, a bunch of incompetent developers can now see your completely legal content in your drives, has your phone details, location details and who knows what association they have. All I wanted was a media player to play the very basic file types, instead it constantly logs out (suspicious), can’t read the folders, search doesn’t work, files lag playing, and you need a a third party email app just to contact them. I paid for premium, what a waste of money.

title: Great App - Currently Broken
body:
This is actually a really great app to manage music. It's even possible to create bookmarks for people who may also be listening to audiobooks next to music.

However, a recent iOS update completely broke the app as it keeps crashing when playing anything. It doesn't seem to be actively maintained given thatthe last update is two years in the past.

author: wynterszn
title: Mplayer for iphone 7 plus
body: Good app, works well. Been using for about a year or so now, only ever crashes sometimes. I wish this app was still updated, pretty sure it's abandoned. They need to add a menu to change the cover art of files in the app instead of embedding covers into the files on a computer. Works really well tho, playlists are easy to make and configure, connects to mega just fine, plays local files really well. The equalizer is awesome and it supports stereo output

author: Terbano
title: Terrible for sample libraries
body: the pre loading buffer is far to big. I use pCloud for my sample libraries and the player is incredibly quick, which is very useful for short samples like snare drums, etc. this mega player is dark ages slow with the buffer. Pros use cloud storage for short samples, and this isn’t the solution. too bad…it’s a huge market.

author: YAKE the GREAT
title: binary ‘Skip Time’ Options are not helpful
body:
This app is almost perfect, but I wish I could have separate skip times for rewind and forwards…
  While Apple Podcasts does not have the option for seconds, they do have dual options and it would be very nice to have that available here! 
  Back and forwards being the same is LIMITING when searching through chapters to find your place.

author: Ja7iX
title: Brilliant for iOS..
body: Let me explain. I haven’t used Windows since 2005 when I switched over to Linux. However, I have used iPhone for years and there aren’t any simple solution to copy music through iTunes on Linux to an iPhone. I have also 90Gb of data available on my mobile connection. So I have my audio copied up to my MEGA account and can easily stream my music to my phone. I’m working on playlists with my favourites…you know when you have a few beers you need one playlist etc. But overall it works great. And NO I will never install a Microsoft product on my hardware again.

author: kynligr
title: Nice, but
body: Its a great player once the music folder has synced. The problem is that each time it syncs it resets the music listing in MPlayer, and all the music files you previously synced and made available to play disappears. If it’s a large library that means waiting a few days at least for it to sync again. Would rate it 5 stars if I hadn’t had to go through this almost every second time I use the app.

author: Swirly Gacha
title: This is great
body: Unlike Spotify, I can play slowed and reverb songs without it getting copyrighted. I can listen to my playlist on this app with my DEVICE TURNED OFF too! I can shuffle play it, loop it, and create different playlists. I can name the playlists, and change the image of the playlist to anything I want. Although, sometimes when I put it on loop, when the song ends it doesnt continue onto the next song on my playlist. It only sometimes happens, which is why I put a four star, but other than that, this app is great for listening to ANY songs you want. You just have to download songs and put it in playlists which is super easy.

It sometimes also crashes (but I noticed that's happening less), and it can also take up to 30 seconds of loading to start playing the songs, and sometimes I have to restart the app because it doesn't load at all.

author: Sky Fall 1912
title: 動体視力、反射神経が試される
body:
megaアプリも併用と思い両方DLして共有させていざプレイと思っても再生出来ません。
「こうしましょう」との指示が出て、その設定画面に行きますが0.5秒で消えます。動体視力が鳥類並みの超人向けのアプリとは思いませんでした。
多分、英語で「Hello！うんたらかんたら」等ユーザの気持ちを逆撫でする無意味なレスあると思いますが今から非常に楽しみです！

author: thefrog3
title: Best app for mega.nz
body: Works exactly as I expected it to. Upgraded to pro version after 2 hours already. All other players work witb Dropbox or other non e2e encrypted storage. This one works witb mega.nz. And it works very well. First I wanted to use apples iTunes Music Match, but they insist on CreditCard info. So I just went with Mega.nz and this app. Noo regrets!

author: orochi_78
title: Sincronizzazione assurda
body: Funziona bene ma la sincronizzazione  ricomincia da capo quando aggiungo dei file. Dato che ho un migliaio di cartelle su mega, devo aspettare delle ore che finisca di scansionare di nuovo tutto il cloud. Inoltre non è “automatica” come indicato ma bisogna avviarla manualmente ogni volta. Manca un sito web o una pagina di supporto. Da migliorare.

author: simplysaucer676767
title: Doesn't Work With New Accounts
body:
I really wanted to like this app, but unfortunately it doesn't work with newly-created MEGA accounts, only old ones.

My new MEGA account logs in perfectly with my MEGA app, but not MPlayer. I keep getting an "Error Expired" popup.

It's such a shame, because I really wanted to like this app. Technical support haven't responded at all to my emails either.

My old MEGA account is full, and I didn't have the time for the additional hassle of creating space for my 25 GB music collection.

I'll be giving Vibe music player a try instead. They can also stream from your MEGA account, as well as other accounts. Haven't tried them yet.

title: Отлично
body:
Приложение определенно must have! В целом функционалом доволен. Из минусов : 
- нет поддержки flac 
- отсутствуют жесты 
Надеюсь в следующем обновлении это исправят.

В обновлении 20.09.2018 все исправили.
Добавлена поддержка жестов, flac играет. Разработчик действительно работает над приложением! Спасибо, 5 звёзд!

author: Marco210856
title: Quasi perfetta!
body:
Provata l'ultima versione (la 2.1) su iPhone X con iOS 11.2.1
L'interfaccia scura è molto bella, però sto riscontrando un problema che sulla v.2.0 non avevo; in pratica se ascolto la musica dagli altoparlanti dell'iPhone, tutto perfetto fino a che non blocco il cellulare, una volta che lo schermo è spento la musica ha delle rapidissime brevi pause che sono fastidiosissime... non so in che altro modo spiegare il fenomeno, è come se ci fossero delle interferenze e non dipendono assolutamente dal telefono... invece di migliorare purtroppo si peggiora!

author: Perkeo1
title: Good Mega player for mp3 files
body: It plays all my mp3 files really well but it will not play Flac files. You can create play lists of the songs in your Mega storage and you can download files to play them  offline. Certainly better than having to play one song at a time using the Megasync app but still Flac is such a well know file format that should be supported by any decent player nowadays.

author: mrnicevip
title: Excelente reproductor
body: Excelente aplicación, debería de ser una app oficial de mega, muy fácil de usar y no molestan con anuncios a cada rato, muy buena no la echen a perder por favor.

author: Gnashing fb
title: Great, except can't close ads & desire more enhancements
body: This app is everything I wanted it to be. However, I have a hard time closing the advertisements. I think I might go ahead and break down and paid two bucks to get the pro version. I wish there was a way I could maintain the ratings and other attributes that I have assigned to my audio files, like I had done in iTunes. I think the shuffle play button doesn't always shuffle. It kind of irked me at first, but it's no big deal because it's easy to work around. Other than that I think this app is really awesome and I thank the folks who developed it. I'm very satisfied overall.

author: Frageee
title: Fast perfekt...
body: Vor einiger Zeit habe ich einen Stern gegeben, mittlerweile habe ich die kostenpflichtige Version und vergebe 4 Sterne. Was mir besonders gefällt ist die Chromecast Unterstützung. Was bei mir noch nicht funktioniert ist die Chromecast Gast-Verbindung, die App stürzt immer ab. Wenn das gehoben wird, bekommt die App 5 Sterne.

author: Bereket & Mesi
title: Best of best but needs improvement
body: So far the best cloud player. Takes care of headache of running low hard disc space. You can enjoy your songs playing on the background while you do other works. Also can form playlist, rename songs easily, can run it fast.  But lacks the versatile links & access to other files & documents  Has no access to transfer songs from iTunes, my voice memos etc and seems not compatible with Safari. I finally managed to get Firefox Add-on.  To upload big files from desk top you need to download MegaSync.
